name: Symphonic Warrior Miccs
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>音響戦士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サウンドウォリアー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マイクス
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Unless you have a "Symphonic Warrior" card in your other Pendulum Zone, this card's Pendulum Scale becomes 4. Once per turn, during your End Phase: You can target 1 of your banished "Symphonic Warrior" monsters; add it to your hand.

[ Monster Effect ] 
You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by removing 3 Symphonic Counters from your field. After you Normal or Special Summon this card, you can Normal Summon 1 monster during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)
pend_eff: Unless you have a "Symphonic Warrior" card in your other Pendulum Zone, this card's Pendulum Scale becomes 4. Once per turn, during your End Phase: You can target 1 of your banished "Symphonic Warrior" monsters; add it to your hand.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by removing 3 Symphonic Counters from your field. After you Normal or Special Summon this card, you can Normal Summon 1 monster during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by removing 3 Symphonic Counters from your field. After you Normal or Special Summon this card, you can Normal Summon 1 monster during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)

action: Applies effect if other Pendulum Zone is not occupied by specific card
Adds banished cards to the hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: Gain this effect once per turn
